# Dispatch API

Access AI optimization suggestions and record dispatch decisions.

## Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/dispatch/suggestions` | Get AI dispatch suggestions |
| POST | `/api/dispatch/decisions` | Accept or reject suggestions |
| POST | `/api/dispatch/cleanup` | Clean up dispatch data |
| POST | `/api/dispatch/resync` | Resync dispatch state |

## AI Planning

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| POST | `/api/aidispatch/sequential-planning` | Batch optimization |
| POST | `/api/aidispatch/continuous-planning` | Continuous optimization |

## Calendar Integration

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/calendar2/technicians` | Calendar technician view |
| GET | `/api/calendar2/visits` | Calendar visits |
| GET | `/api/calendar2/suggestions` | Calendar suggestions |
| GET | `/api/calendar2/pending` | Pending calendar items |
